title: Stock Market Today | Bombay Stock Exchange Updates | Global Stock Market News  - Moneycontrol.com
content:
## Stock Market Today

## Midcap, smallcap indices underperform benchmarks; end two-week rally

## Helios MF buys 0.6% shares in Landmark Cars, Axis Mutual Fund pares stake worth Rs 138 crore in ZF Commercial Vehicle

## RIL Q1 FY27: Strong show by oil derivatives business despite volatile energy markets

## Business in the Week Ahead (July 20 – July 24, 2026)

## Divergence between benchmarks and broader markets extends for second day. Analysts decode the phenomenon

## Tech Mahindra sets Ex-Date for AGM eligibility today, shares climb 0.77%

## Taking Stock: Sensex gains 965 pts, Nifty above 24,300; IT, banks rally; metal, pharma drag

## Mahindra and Mahindra shares gain 2.03%

## ABB India shares fall 2.09% in today's session

## Britannia Industries shares rise 2.01%, trading at Rs 5,417

## Eicher Motors shares rise over 2% to Rs 7,570

## Adani Green Energy shares decline 2.20% to Rs 1,509.80

## Netflix shares drop 9% in pre-market trade as Q3 revenue guidance misses estimates

## Reduce Wipro: target of Rs 153: ICICI Securities

## Hold Tech Mahindra: target of Rs 1470: ICICI Securities

## Hold Newgen Software Technologies: target of Rs 560: ICICI Securities

## Hold Himadri Speciality Chemical: target of Rs 720: ICICI Securities

## Buy Jana Small Finance Bank; target of Rs 600: ICICI Securities

## Buy ITC Hotels; target of Rs 235: ICICI Securities

## Buy Bharat Heavy Electricals; target of Rs 520: ICICI Securities

## JSW Steel Q1 results: Net profit more than doubles to Rs 4,696 crore, beats estimates

## Buy Tech Mahindra; target of Rs 1900: Motilal Oswal

## CG Power and Industrial Solutions shares fall 2.04% in today's trade

## Buy Polycab India; target of Rs 11,900: Motilal Oswal

## ICICI Bank shares gain over 2% amid strong financial performance

## Watch

## Advisory Alert:

## You got 30 Day’s Trial of
Indian equities are expected to witness a gradual uptrend next week, on the back of a strong Q1FY27 earnings season so far, which is likely to remain the key driver of sectoral and stock-specific performance, says Siddhartha Khemka - Head of Research, Wealth Management, Motilal Oswal Financial Services.
Landmark Cars stock may have reacted to the deal, rising 5.31 percent to Rs 526.25 amid above-average volumes on the National Stock Exchange, and trading well-above all key moving averages.
Key near-term factors to watch include volatility in global oil and refining markets, AI adoption and investment, hyper growth of FMCG business and capex in new energy business
Macro data in the coming week will focus on manufacturing activity and inflation. Key releases include UK unemployment and inflation, US jobless claims, the European Central Bank's interest rate decision, and manufacturing PMI data from India, Europe, the UK and the US
Nifty has remained range-bound between 23,800 and 24,300 since last Wednesday despite witnessing sharp intraday volatility.
The company's robust financials and active corporate governance actions continue to attract investor attention, positioning it firmly within the competitive IT services sector.
The Indian rupee snapped four-day losing streak and ended higher by 7 paise at 96.28 against the US dollar, compared with the previous close of 96.35.
With the stock's last traded price at Rs 3,181.10, Mahindra and Mahindra continues to be a closely watched stock in the Nifty 50 index.
With the stock's last traded price at Rs 7,507.50, ABB India saw a decline of 2.09% from its previous close.
Britannia Industries shares witnessed a notable gain of 2.01% in Friday's trading session, with the stock last traded at Rs 5,417.00.
Eicher Motors shares gained 2.04% to trade at Rs 7,570.00 in Friday's session, supported by robust financial growth over recent years and consistent dividend payouts.
Adani Green Energy Limited's shares saw a 2.20% decrease, with the current price at Rs 1,509.80 at 3:26 pm. This movement reflects broader market dynamics, even as the company's financial performance continues to demonstrate growth, and investor sentiment remains positive.
Netflix Inc. shares dropped sharply in after-hours trading on Thursday after the streaming giant's third-quarter revenue guidance missed Wall Street estimates.
ICICI Securities recommended reduce rating on Wipro with a target price of Rs 153 in its research report dated July 17, 2026.
ICICI Securities recommended hold rating on Tech Mahindra with a target price of Rs 1470 in its research report dated July 17, 2026.
ICICI Securities recommended hold rating on Newgen Software Technologies with a target price of Rs 560 in its research report dated July 17, 2026.
ICICI Securities recommended hold rating on Himadri Speciality Chemical with a target price of Rs 720 in its research report dated July 17, 2026.
ICICI Securities is bullish on Jana Small Finance Bank has recommended buy rating on the stock with a target price of Rs 600 in its research report dated July 16, 2026.
ICICI Securities is bullish on ITC Hotels has recommended buy rating on the stock with a target price of Rs 235 in its research report dated July 16, 2026.
ICICI Securities is bullish on Bharat Heavy Electricals has recommended buy rating on the stock with a target price of Rs 520 in its research report dated July 17, 2026.
The company's revenue from operations rose 9.8 percent to Rs 47,364 crore in the April-June quarter of 2026-27.
Motilal Oswal is bullish on Tech Mahindra recommended buy rating on the stock with a target price of Rs 1900 in its research report dated July 16, 2026.
CG Power and Industrial Solutions shares declined by 2.04% to Rs 903.10 on Friday afternoon. The company is a constituent of the Nifty Next 50 index.
Motilal Oswal is bullish on Polycab India recommended buy rating on the stock with a target price of Rs 11,900 in its research report dated July 16, 2026.
With ICICI Bank shares gaining over 2% to Rs 1,447.70, the bank showcases robust annual revenue and net profit growth, strong balance sheet expansion, and consistent dividend payouts, backed by bullish investor sentiment.
You are already a Moneycontrol Pro user.
